description: CANONICAL Config & Secret Registry for the Delivery OS PLATFORM itself — the first one to exist (the platform previously ran no app and owned no runtime secrets, so only consumers had registries; the I-Config oracle therefore could not discover a platform secret because there was nowhere to declare it). ADR-005 makes the platform own the Execution Engine RUNTIME, which introduces the platform's first runtime secret: ENGINE_DATABASE_URL. This registry closes that gap. NOTE / oracle limitation (honest): the engine runs on an EXECUTION NODE (a new 'node' plane, not Vercel/GitHub), so ENGINE_DATABASE_URL lives in the node's 0600 local env file — the current i-config oracle introspects the vercel/github planes and cannot remotely validate a node-plane secret; node-plane validation is verify-node.sh's job at the node. Declaring it here makes it KNOWN/required, not silently missing.

node.secretStore: Execution Node local secure store — a 0600 env file at ~/.config/deliveryos/engine.env, provisioned by templates/execution-node/provision-engine-runtime.sh; never tree-resident, never in a world-readable plist.

keys.purpose: The Delivery OS platform Execution Engine's MANAGED, OFF-NODE durable Postgres (ADR-005 / Engine-Database-Contract). Holds ONLY platform execution state (workflow_run/step/approval_audit — PII-free, refs-only, zero consumer FKs). MUST be a dedicated platform database (a separate Supabase PROJECT in the existing Ruma Housing Supabase org), NOT node-local (replaceability) and NOT a consumer's DATABASE_URL (consumers never own platform execution). Unlike the serverless consumer DATABASE_URL, the always-on node engine holds a small persistent pool, so the transaction-POOLER (:6543) is NOT required — a direct postgres URL is correct. data_class SECRET (carries the DB password — §54.2 trust boundary, never tree-resident).
keys.fix: Create a DEDICATED Supabase project for the Delivery OS engine inside the EXISTING Ruma Housing Supabase org (no new vendor). Use a least-privilege Postgres role (substitute for the reference rumah_app). Provide the connection string to the Execution Node; provision-engine-runtime.sh applies migrations 0001-0004 + writes it to the 0600 node env file. Do NOT reuse rumah-admin's DATABASE_URL (that is a consumer DB).
